sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { motion, useScroll, useTransform } from 'framer-motion'; import { ArrowRightIcon, CheckBadgeIcon, ChartBarIcon, ChatBubbleLeftRightIcon, ShieldCheckIcon, UserGroupIcon, DocumentTextIcon, GlobeAltIcon, ClockIcon, StarIcon, ChevronRightIcon, PlayIcon, SparklesIcon, FingerPrintIcon, } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import CountUp from 'react-countup'; import { useInView } from 'react-intersection-observer'; const Home = () => { const [hoveredCard, setHoveredCard] = useState(null); const { scrollYProgress } = useScroll(); const y = useTransform(scrollYProgress, [0, 1], [0, 200]); const opacity = useTransform(scrollYProgress, [0, 0.5], [1, 0]); const stats = [ { id: 1, value: 225, label: 'Politicians Tracked', icon: UserGroupIcon, suffix: '+' }, { id: 2, value: 1247, label: 'Promises Made', icon: DocumentTextIcon, suffix: '+' }, { id: 3, value: 856, label: 'Promises Kept', icon: CheckBadgeIcon, suffix: '+' }, { id: 4, value: 3452, label: 'Citizen Reports', icon: ChatBubbleLeftRightIcon, suffix: '+' }, ]; const features = [ { icon: ShieldCheckIcon, title: 'Promise Tracking', description: 'Track political promises with status updates, supporting evidence, and public accountability.', gradient: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-500', stats: '95% Accuracy', delay: 0, }, { icon: ChartBarIcon, title: 'Performance Analytics', description: 'View completion rates, politician ratings, and promise fulfillment history.', gradient: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500', stats: 'Live Updates', delay: 0.1, }, { icon: GlobeAltIcon, title: 'News Integration', description: 'Connect political news and developments with ongoing promises and public feedback.', gradient: 'from-orange-500 to-red-500', stats: '24/7 Updates', delay: 0.2, }, { icon: ChatBubbleLeftRightIcon, title: 'Citizen Feedback', description: 'Let citizens contribute reports, opinions, and evidence for better transparency.', gradient: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-500', stats: '10k+ Reviews', delay: 0.3, }, ]; const topPoliticians = [ { name: 'Ranil Wickremesinghe', role: 'President of Sri Lanka', party: 'UNP', promisesKept: 85, totalPromises: 120, rating: 70.8, image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/5c/Ranil_Wickremesinghe_2017.jpg/800px-Ranil_Wickremesinghe_2017.jpg', place: 'Sri Lankan Parliament', placeDescription: 'A major national political landmark linked with parliamentary governance and leadership.', placeImage: '/images/places/parliament.jpg', trend: '+5.2%', color: '#FF6B35', }, { name: 'Sajith Premadasa', role: 'Opposition Leader', party: 'SJB', promisesKept: 67, totalPromises: 95, rating: 70.5, image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/4f/Sajith_Premadasa_%28cropped%29.jpg/800px-Sajith_Premadasa_%28cropped%29.jpg', place: 'Independence Square, Colombo', placeDescription: 'A well-known civic location representing public gatherings, national identity, and political visibility.', placeImage: '/images/places/independence-square.jpg', trend: '+3.8%', color: '#1B4D3E', }, { name: 'Anura Kumara Dissanayake', role: 'Party Leader - NPP', party: 'NPP', promisesKept: 52, totalPromises: 78, rating: 66.7, image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2c/Anura_Kumara_Dissanayake.jpg/800px-Anura_Kumara_Dissanayake.jpg', place: 'Galle Face Green, Colombo', placeDescription: 'A famous public space strongly connected with civic engagement, political gatherings, and public voice.', placeImage: '/images/places/galle-face.jpg', trend: '+12.3%', color: '#800000', }, ]; const recentNews = [ { title: 'Economic recovery discussions continue in Colombo', source: 'Political Desk', time: '2 hours ago', category: 'Economy', image: '/images/news/colombo-news.jpg', url: '#', }, { title: 'Public accountability and governance reforms remain in focus', source: 'Civic Monitor', time: '5 hours ago', category: 'Governance', image: '/images/news/governance-news.jpg', url: '#', }, { title: 'Youth participation and democratic engagement grow across Sri Lanka', source: 'Citizen Watch', time: '1 day ago', category: 'Society', image: '/images/news/youth-news.jpg', url: '#', }, ]; const testimonials = [ { name: 'Nimal Perera', role: 'Colombo Resident', image: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/1.jpg', comment: 'This platform helps us clearly see which promises are being kept and which are not.', rating: 5, }, { name: 'Kamala Silva', role: 'Community Volunteer', image: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/2.jpg', comment: 'The visual design and transparent data make this very useful for citizens.', rating: 5, }, { name: 'Dr. Asanka Weerasinghe', role: 'University Lecturer', image: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/3.jpg', comment: 'A very strong concept for democratic transparency and public participation.', rating: 5, }, ]; const StatSection = () => { const [ref, inView] = useInView({ triggerOnce: true, threshold: 0.1 }); return (
{stats.map((stat, idx) => (
{stat.suffix && }
{inView ? : 0} {stat.suffix}
{stat.label}
 ))}
); }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}
Transparency Platform Track Political Promises in Sri Lanka Empowering citizens with real-time data on political accountability, promise tracking, and public participation across Sri Lanka. Start Tracking Now {['Trusted by citizens', 'Visual promise tracking', 'Sri Lanka focused'].map((badge, i) => (
{badge}
))}
{/* Stats Section */}
{/* Features Section */}

Powerful Features for {' '}Democratic Transparency

A modern platform designed to connect citizens, political promises, and public evidence.

{features.map((feature, idx) => ( setHoveredCard(idx)} onHoverEnd={() => setHoveredCard(null)} className="group relative" >

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

{feature.stats}
))}
{/* Politicians Section */}

Leading Politicians Performance Dashboard

Real-time tracking with politician photos and Sri Lanka-related landmark highlights

{topPoliticians.map((politician, idx) => (

{politician.name}

{politician.role}

{politician.party}

{politician.place}

{politician.placeDescription}

Promise Fulfillment {politician.rating}%
Kept: {politician.promisesKept} Total: {politician.totalPromises} {politician.trend}
View Detailed Report
))}
{/* News Section */}

Latest Political News

Sri Lanka-focused visual news section

View All News
{recentNews.map((news, idx) => (
{news.category}

{news.title}

{news.source} {news.time}
))}
{/* Testimonials */}

Trusted by Citizens Across Sri Lanka

Join users who want better political transparency

{testimonials.map((testimonial, idx) => (

{testimonial.name}

{testimonial.role}

{[...Array(testimonial.rating)].map((_, i) => ( ))}

"{testimonial.comment}"

 ))}
{/* CTA */}

Ready to Make a Difference?

Join the movement for transparent governance in Sri Lanka.

Get Started Now
{/* Floating Button */}
); }; export default Home;
